---
name: Improvement
about: Track a product, cloud, security, model, or documentation improvement
title: ""
labels: improvement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should be improved?

## Why It Matters

How does this improve the product, cloud deployment, security posture, or reviewer experience?

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Extension
- [ ] AWS deployment
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Model
- [ ] Documentation

## Done When

- [ ] Change is implemented
- [ ] Tests or checks are run where applicable
- [ ] README/docs are updated if needed
- [ ] Screenshots are updated if needed
